objective: Implement PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY Phase 7 skeletonization and context shaping with expansion policy, snippet renderer, line elision metadata, and regression tests

evaluator.command: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when TypeScript check, tests proving large implementation chunks default to skeleton, precise query returns focused body window, elided/returned line counts are accurate, existing context behavior stays stable, and production build pass

lastValidation.evidence: Implemented Phase 7 skeletonization and context shaping: added skeletonizer, expansion policy, and snippet renderer; ContextBuilder now renders snippets through expansion policy; large chunks default to skeleton, precise/debug matches return focused body windows, full requests can return full_body, and returned/original/elided line counts are computed from rendered output. Regression tests cover large skeleton output, focused marker windows, small chunk behavior, and existing context behavior. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
